title: Daewoo Stirling Collection, Jug Kettle 1.7 Litre, User Friendly, Easy Cleaning, Safety Features, 360° Swivel Base, Extra Wide Opening Lid, Water Level Gauge, Part Of A Collection, Grey
features: 7 Litres capacity, 3KW heating element, Cordless kettle, Extra wide opening lid, Removable filter, Corded 360° Swivel base, Cord storage, Auto shut off, Power indicator, Water level gauge, Boil dry protection, Stylish design, Range of colours, Part of a collection

SAFETY – The auto shut-off guarantees that your kettle won't overheat or overboil, while the boil dry protection prevents damage when water levels are insufficient. Additionally, the power indicator keeps you informed, ensuring you're always in control

EASY CLEANING – The removable filter is a valuable feature, allowing you to effortlessly maintain the cleanliness and functionality, ensuring consistently great-tasting water. Also, extends the lifespan, making it a durable and reliable addition

USER-FRIENDLY FEATURES – Enjoy the practicality of a 360° swivel base making it convenient to pick up the kettle from any angle or hand, a water level gauge for precise measurements, and an extra-wide opening lid for easy filling and cleaning

STIRLING COLLECTION – Upgrade your kitchens décor with the modern Stirling design that adds style to your countertop. Choose from a range of colours and shop the matching toaster for a cohesive look or mix and match too add personality to your space
3-YEAR WARRANTY FOR PEACE OF MIND – Enjoy 3-year warranty, subject to online registration, ensuring your confidence in the longevity and quality of your Daewoo Stirling Collection Jug Kettle
